title: Formating RTL in Subimtes automation notifications
excerpt: I am trying to create a notification to user when a status of a subitem was changed so the user will receive automated eMail in Hebrew that will contain the details of the subitem name inside a text message,  everything …

posts.author: rony123 (Rony)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to create a notification to user when a status of a subitem was changed so the user will receive automated eMail in Hebrew that will contain the details of the subitem name inside a text message, everything should be from right to left.
This is not supported.
Very essential for non English readers.
to do it now I need that the subitems text or elements from board that are required to be part of notification should be inserted as separated line, otherwise its presented wrong from Left to RIght

posts.author: MaryJan (Mary Jennings)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, monday.com doesn’t fully support RTL formatting in automation notifications, which makes Hebrew text appear incorrectly when combined with dynamic fields like subitem names.

A workaround is to structure the message with separate lines for static and dynamic content to maintain proper alignment. Another option is using HTML encoding in the email body if your notification is sent via external integration tools, allowing more control over text direction.
